headline: Alphabet Stock Joins the Dow but It’s Rising for a Different Reason
summary: The shares were up 1.2% in premarket trading.  The Google-parent is replacing  Verizon Communications  in the 30-stock Dow index from Monday’s session, in a move announced last week.  Because the Dow is a price-weighted index—meaning stock price rather than market capitalization determine the weighting of each company—few funds choose to replicate its composition.

content.title: Alphabet Stock Joins the Dow but It’s Rising for a Different Reason

The Google-parent is replacing  Verizon Communications  in the 30-stock Dow index from Monday’s session, in a move announced last week.  Because the Dow is a price-weighted index—meaning stock price rather than market capitalization determine the weighting of each company—few funds choose to replicate its composition.

headline: Morgan Stanley Lifts Tesla Delivery Forecast on Stronger Europe and China Demand (TSLA)
summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its forecast for Tesla’s (NASDAQ:TSLA) second-quarter vehicle deliveries after stronger-than-expected sales trends in Europe and China, although the bank continues to take a cautious view of the company’s energy storage business. The brokerage now expects Tesla to deliver around 413,000 vehicles during the second quarter, up from its previous estimate of approximately 373,000 and above the current market consensus of roughly 401,000 units.

content.title: Morgan Stanley Lifts Tesla Delivery Forecast on Stronger Europe and China Demand (TSLA)
content.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its forecast for Tesla’s (NASDAQ:TSLA) second-quarter vehicle deliveries after stronger-than-expected sales trends in Europe and China, although the bank continues to take a cautious view of the company’s energy storage business. The brokerage now expects Tesla to deliver around 413,000 vehicles during the second quarter, up from its previous estimate of approximately 373,000 and above the current market consensus of roughly 401,000 units.

Microsoft  jumped 2% ahead of the open, while  Amazon Alphabet Nvidia Meta  and  Tesla  were all up around 1%.

headline: Alphabet Joins the Dow Today. Surging AI Demand Is Pushing Shares Higher.
summary: The Google-parent is replacing  Verizon Communications  in the 30-stock Dow index from Monday’s session, in a move announced last week.  Because the Dow is a price-weighted index—meaning stock price rather than market capitalization determine the weighting of each company—few funds choose to replicate its composition.  Alphabet’s move comes amid a broader rebound for the Magnificent Seven group of stocks on Monday.

content.title: Alphabet Joins the Dow Today. Surging AI Demand Is Pushing Shares Higher.
content.summary: The Google-parent is replacing  Verizon Communications  in the 30-stock Dow index from Monday’s session, in a move announced last week.  Because the Dow is a price-weighted index—meaning stock price rather than market capitalization determine the weighting of each company—few funds choose to replicate its composition.  Alphabet’s move comes amid a broader rebound for the Magnificent Seven group of stocks on Monday.
